name: Alert with Action Button
description: Alert banner with optional action button

usageGuidance.when: Inline notification or alert that needs user action
antiPatterns: Don't use for modal confirmations - use Dialog instead
Don't use multiple buttons - keeps alerts simple

notes.variants: Use variant='success' for success messages, 'warning' for warnings, 'error' for errors, 'info' (default) for general information
notes.dismissible: Set dismissible=true to allow users to close the alert
notes.action: Action button should be secondary/ghost variant to maintain visual hierarchy

examples.name: Info with action
examples.description: Information alert with learn more action

examples.name: Warning with action
examples.description: Warning alert with action to resolve

examples.name: Error dismissible
examples.description: Error alert that can be dismissed
